codestarnotifications.notificationrule.C: Creates a notification rule for a resource. The rule specifies the events you want notifications about and the targets (such as AWS Chatbot topics or AWS Chatbot clients configured for Slack) where you want to receive them.

codestarnotifications.notificationrule.C.Description: Not currently supported by AWS CloudFormation.

codestarnotifications.notificationrule.D.Description: The level of detail to include in the notifications for this resource. `BASIC` will include only the contents of the event as it would appear in Amazon CloudWatch. `FULL` will include any supplemental information provided by AWS CodeStar Notifications and/or the service for the resource for which the notification is created.

codestarnotifications.notificationrule.E.Description: Not currently supported by AWS CloudFormation.

A list of event types associated with this notification rule. For a complete list of event types and IDs, see [Notification concepts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/codestar-notifications/latest/userguide/concepts.html#concepts-api) in the *Developer Tools Console User Guide*.

codestarnotifications.notificationrule.N.Description: The name for the notification rule. Notification rule names must be unique in your AWS account.

codestarnotifications.notificationrule.R.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the resource to associate with the notification rule. Supported resources include pipelines in AWS CodePipeline, repositories in AWS CodeCommit, and build projects in AWS CodeBuild.

codestarnotifications.notificationrule.S.Description: The status of the notification rule. The default value is `ENABLED`. If the status is set to `DISABLED`, notifications aren't sent for the notification rule.

codestarnotifications.notificationrule.T.Description: A list of tags to apply to this notification rule. Key names cannot start with "`aws`".
Not currently supported by AWS CloudFormation.
A list of Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) of AWS Chatbot topics and AWS Chatbot clients to associate with the notification rule.
